full_text:
Sima Min (Youda) 司馬敏 (幼達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Min (司馬敏), styledYouda (幼達). Youngest son of Sima Fang, he died young and left no heirs. Sima Min was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
